html:
Configuration

Customize loongclaw settings.

Configuration File

Located at ~/.claw/config.json.

Example Configuration

{
  "model": "literati-7b",
  "temperature": 0.7,
  "top_p": 0.9,
  "context_length": 4096
}

Environment Variables

  • CLAW_HOST - Server host (default: 127.0.0.1)
  • CLAW_PORT - Server port (default: 11434)
